input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

output_parameters.name: closed
output_parameters.description: Boolean Flags whether the WebSocket session is closed. A value of : true indicates that the WebSocket session was closed successfully. false indicates that the WebSocket session was not closed successfully.

services.name: pub.websocket:disconnect
services.description: WmPublic. Closes the WebSocket connection abruptly.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

output_parameters.name: disconnected
output_parameters.description: Boolean Flags whether the WebSocket connection is disconnected. A value of : true indicates that the WebSocket session was disconnected successfully. false indicates that the WebSocket session was not disconnected successfully.

services.name: pub.websocket:getCookies
services.description: WmPublic: Retrieves the cookies that are part of the HTTP request to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the cookies information.

output_parameters.name: cookies
output_parameters.description: Document List- Conditional. List of the cookies that are part of the HTTP request to establish a WebSocket connection. This parameter returns value only if cookies were part of the request.

output_parameters.name: name
output_parameters.description: String The name of the cookie.

output_parameters.name: comment
output_parameters.description: String Description about the purpose of the cookie. This parameter returns null if the cookie has no comment.

output_parameters.name: commentURL
output_parameters.description: String The comment URL which describes the purpose of the cookie. This parameter returns null if the cookie has no comment.

output_parameters.name: discard
output_parameters.description: String The value of the discard attribute for the cookie.

output_parameters.name: domain
output_parameters.description: String The domain name set for the given cookies.

output_parameters.name: maxAge
output_parameters.description: String The maximum age of the cookie specified in seconds.

output_parameters.name: path
output_parameters.description: String The path on the server to which the browser returns the cookie.

output_parameters.name: portlist
output_parameters.description: String The value of the port list attribute of the cookie.

output_parameters.name: secure
output_parameters.description: String Indicates whether sending the cookie is restricted to a secure protocol or any protocol. True Sending the cookie is restricted to a secure protocol. False The cookie can be sent using any protocol.

output_parameters.name: value
output_parameters.description: String The value of the cookie.

output_parameters.name: version
output_parameters.description: String The version of the protocol with which the cookie complies.

services.name: pub.websocket:getExtensions
services.description: WmPublic: Retrieves the extensions used in the request URL to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the extension information.

output_parameters.name: extensions
output_parameters.description: Document List Conditional. The list of extensions for a WebSocket connection.

output_parameters.name: name
output_parameters.description: String The name of the header.

output_parameters.name: parameterizedName
output_parameters.description: String The parameterized name of the extension.

output_parameters.name: parameterKeys
output_parameters.description: String List The parameterized keys of the extension.

output_parameters.name: parameters
output_parameters.description: Document List The list of parameters for the given extension.

services.name: pub.websocket:getHeaders
services.description: WmPublic: Retrieves the headers used in the request URL to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the header information.

output_parameters.name: headers
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. The list of the headers included in with the request to establish a WebSocket connection. This parameter returns a value only if headers were part of the request.

output_parameters.name: name
output_parameters.description: String The name of the header.

output_parameters.name: value
output_parameters.description: String The value of the header.

services.name: pub.websocket:getPathParameters
services.description: WmPublic: Retrieves the path parameters used in the request URL to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the path parameters information.

output_parameters.name: queryParameters
output_parameters.description: Document List Conditional. The path parameters included in with the request for establishing a WebSocket connection.

output_parameters.name: name
output_parameters.description: String The name of the path parameter.

output_parameters.name: value
output_parameters.description: String List The value of the path parameter.

services.name: pub.websocket:getPathParameter
services.description: WmPublic: Retrieves the path parameter used in the request URL to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the path parameter information.

input_parameters.name: pathParameterName
input_parameters.description: String The path parameter name of the query parameter for which you want to obtain a value.

output_parameters.name: pathParameterValue
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. The value for the provided parameter name. This parameter is returned only if a path parameter of the specified value was part of the request.

services.name: pub.websocket:getRequest
services.description: WmPublic: Retrieves the HTTP request information used to establish the WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve HTTP request information.

output_parameters.name: requestURI
output_parameters.description: String The Uniform Resource Identifier used by the client to identify the request.

output_parameters.name: queryString
output_parameters.description: String One or more name/value pairs included as part of the query strings in request uniform resource locator(URL) which assigns values to specified parameters. For example, ?name=ferret&color=purple.

output_parameters.name: host
output_parameters.description: String Name or IP address of the WebSocket server that received the upgrade request.

output_parameters.name: httpVersion
output_parameters.description: String The HTTP version used in the request.

output_parameters.name: method
output_parameters.description: String The HTTP method used for establishing WebSocket connection.

output_parameters.name: origin
output_parameters.description: String The value of the origin request header.

output_parameters.name: userPrincipal
output_parameters.description: String The name of the authenticated user used in the request.

services.name: pub.websocket:getQueryParameters
services.description: WmPublic: Retrieves the query parameters used in the request URL to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to obtain query parameters.

output_parameters.name: queryParameters
output_parameters.description: Document List Conditional. The list of query parameters used on the URL that established a WebSocket connection.

output_parameters.name: name
output_parameters.description: String The name of the query parameter.

output_parameters.name: value
output_parameters.description: String List The value of the query parameter.

services.name: pub.websocket:getQueryParameter
services.description: WmPublic: Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the value of a specific query parameter information.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to obtain query parameters.

input_parameters.name: queryParameterName
input_parameters.description: String The name of the query parameter for which you want to obtain a value.

output_parameters.name: queryParameterValue
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. The value for the provided parameter name. The parameter is only returned if there is a query parameter of that name in the URL.

services.name: pub.websocket:getSubProtocols
services.description: WmPublic: Retrieves the subprotocols used in the request URL to establish a WebSocket connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to retrieve the subprotocols of the connection.

output_parameters.name: subProtocols
output_parameters.description: String List The WebSocket protocols used as part of establishing a WebSocket connection.

services.name: pub.websocket:onBinary
services.description: WmPublic. Specification for a callback service related to WebSocket server or client endpoint that handles binary payload.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: payload
input_parameters.description: byte[ ] Byte array that contains the payload.

input_parameters.name: offset
input_parameters.description: Integer The offset from the byte array till which the data is to be read.

input_parameters.name: length
input_parameters.description: Integer The maximum number of byte array to read from the payload.

services.name: pub.websocket:onClose
services.description: WmPublic. Specification for a callback service related to WebSocket server or client endpoint that gets invoked when a WebSocket session is closed or disconnected.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: statusCode
input_parameters.description: Integer Indicates the reason why the underlying WebSocket connection was closed. The pre-defined status codes when closing an established connection are defined in Section https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6455#section-7.4.

input_parameters.name: reason
input_parameters.description: String Text explaining the reason for closure.

services.name: pub.websocket:onConnect
services.description: WmPublic. Specification for a callback service related to WebSocket server or client endpoint that gets invoked when a WebSocket session is successfully established.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

services.name: pub.websocket:onError
services.description: WmPublic. Specification for a callback service related to WebSocket server or client endpoint that gets invoked when an error is encountered resulting in WebSocket session termination.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: cause
input_parameters.description: String Text explaining the cause of the error.

services.name: pub.websocket:onText
services.description: WmPublic. Specification for a callback service related to WebSocket server or client endpoint that handles text payload.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: message
input_parameters.description: String The content of the message.

services.name: pub.websocket:ping
services.description: WmPublic: Sends a ping message containing the given application data to the remote endpoint after establishing the connection.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Required. Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to send the ping message.

input_parameters.name: applicationData
input_parameters.description: String Optional. The application data to be sent as part of the ping message. If the parameter value is null an empty buffer will be sent.

input_parameters.name: charset
input_parameters.description: String Optional. The character encoding. If the parameter value is null, the default character set is used.

output_parameters.name: pinged
output_parameters.description: String Indicates the success or failure of the ping message. This parameter returns a value of true if the ping message is received successfully. Else the parameter returns the value false.

services.name: pub.websocket:pong
services.description: WmPublic: Sends back an unsolicited pong message with the exact application data as the ping for the WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID for the WebSocket session for which you want to send the pong message.

input_parameters.name: applicationData
input_parameters.description: String Optional. The application data to be sent as part of the pong message. If the parameter value is null an empty buffer will be sent.

input_parameters.name: charset
input_parameters.description: String Optional. The character encoding. If the parameter value is null, the default character set is used.

output_parameters.name: ponged
output_parameters.description: String Conditional. Indicates the success or failure of the pong message. This parameter returns a value of true if the pong message is received successfully. Else the parameter returns the value of false.

services.name: pub.websocket:send
services.description: WmPublic. Sends a message on a connected WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: sessionId
input_parameters.description: String Session ID to identify the WebSocket session.

input_parameters.name: message
input_parameters.description: Object Sends messages containing the payload to the destination. The message could be a byte array or a text message.

output_parameters.name: sent
output_parameters.description: Boolean Flags indicating the result of the send operation. A value of : true indicates that the WebSocket session was sent successfully. false indicates that the WebSocket session was not sent successfully.
